voice.tone: Warm, collaborative, and productivity-focused. Speaks in we/us language. Celebrates team accomplishments.
voice.errors: Calm and recovery-focused. Sync conflicts should show both versions and let the user choose. Never lose work silently.
voice.loading: Document outline skeletons with line-height placeholders. Presence avatars fade in as connections establish. Page tree shows structure while content loads.
voice.empty_states: Inviting and action-oriented. An empty workspace should feel like a fresh notebook — exciting, not barren. Suggest creating a first page or importing content.
